run_metadata.title: Pre-registered sealed OOS validation protocol for the frozen 55/20/20/2.0 daily NQ Donchian baseline
run_metadata.status: PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL — frozen before any 2023-2025 OOS data is unsealed, transcoded, or run

section_1_frozen_strategy.market: NQ continuous daily bars (NQ.c.0, UTC-calendar daily, same construction as S23-D8/D13)
section_1_frozen_strategy.accounting: R-only (1R = initial 2N stop distance); no dollar/point-value/cost/roll
section_1_frozen_strategy.engine_behavior: Identical to S23-D14: continuous time-sorted bar stream, single simulate() call, channels/ATR/open positions carry across boundaries; lookahead-safe (prior bars only; management starts bar after entry; hard stop checked before channel exit). No code change permitted.

section_2_frozen_is_reference.source: reports/s23_d14_2013_2022_donchian_is_baseline/report.json (frozen reference, not to be re-run for this protocol)

section_3_oos_window.treatment: SEALED / UNSEEN until this protocol is committed
section_3_oos_window.run_policy: Run ONCE only, after this protocol is committed. No re-runs, no parameter edits, no subperiod cherry-picking.
section_3_oos_window.prerequisite: Separate explicit approval required to transcode 2023-2025 from local Databento-native source (mirroring S23-D13 method) before the single OOS run.

section_4_minimum_evaluation_metrics: comparison: OOS expectancy vs IS expectancy (+0.16R)
comparison: OOS max drawdown vs IS max drawdown (6.34R)

all_must_hold: OOS max drawdown <= 1.5 x IS max DD (<= 9.51R), UNLESS total R remains positive and the excess drawdown is explained by sequence risk
at least one positive OOS year
no single trade accounts for more than 80% of OOS net profit
no data-QA defect invalidates the result

any_triggers: OOS trade count too small for confidence
positive result depends mostly on one trade
one year strongly dominates the result
max drawdown materially exceeds IS max DD without recovery

section_5_decision_rules.precedence: Evaluate FAIL triggers first, then WATCH, then PASS. If any FAIL trigger fires, classification is FAIL regardless of other metrics. PASS requires ALL PASS conditions AND no FAIL/WATCH trigger.

section_6_interpretation_rules.PASS: Does NOT mean live trading. Means proceed only to the validation layer: trade-order Monte Carlo, drawdown sequence-risk analysis, entry significance, regime breakdown.
section_6_interpretation_rules.WATCH: Do not optimize immediately. First inspect data quality and trade distribution.
section_6_interpretation_rules.FAIL: Park the frozen Donchian baseline or move to a new hypothesis. Do NOT tune against OOS.

section_7_anti_overfit_rules: No adding filters after seeing OOS unless it becomes a NEW, separately-labeled branch with fresh FUTURE OOS.
No paper or live promotion from this step.

git_handling.note: Determined at runtime via git check-ignore; see report.md / final response. If ignored and the repo style is to track protocol docs, exact files proposed before any staging.
